description: Content evals for the docs-corpus-audit skill. Each scenario seeds a known drift pattern into a corpus snapshot (or describes one already present at HEAD) and asserts the skill catches it AND that the applied fix grounds out true on re-verification. Run twice per scenario: WITH the skill loaded and WITHOUT (control). If with-skill and without-skill produce indistinguishable outputs, the skill adds no value.

scenarios.prompt: Audit the entire docs corpus and reground every claim against current code.
scenarios.seeded_drift: In docs/src/content/docs/reference/cli/install.md, the --no-cache flag table row is renamed in source to --skip-cache. The docs still document --no-cache.
expected_behavior: Wave agent extracts the --no-cache claim from the install.md page.
S7 verification: `uv run apm install --help` does NOT list --no-cache; lists --skip-cache.
Wave agent marks DRIFTED, applies surgical 1-line edit: --no-cache -> --skip-cache.
Alignment-loop re-grep: --no-cache no longer appears in install.md.
scenarios.control_baseline: Without the skill, the LLM may rewrite the flag from recall (manufactured), miss the drift entirely, or rewrite unrelated rows. Skill value = S7 verification step caught the drift and bounded the edit.

scenarios.prompt: We just reshaped the TOC, find every dead nav link across the docs.
scenarios.seeded_drift: Three pages (quickstart.mdx, getting-started/first-package.md, concepts/lifecycle.md) reference the retired slug guides/install-and-use/. The current slug is consumer/install-and-use/.
expected_behavior: Per-scope agents may catch the dead link on the pages they own.
Orchestrator post-pass runs scripts/scan-cross-corpus-drift.sh ia-links and finds ALL THREE residues (per-scope agents only see their own scope).
Alignment-loop: re-run ia-links scan returns no matches.
scenarios.control_baseline: Without the skill, per-page review catches at most 1 of the 3 (the one the human happens to read). The cross-corpus post-pass is the load-bearing primitive here.

scenarios.prompt: Quarterly docs drift sweep -- catch the accumulated drift, especially deprecation banners.
scenarios.seeded_drift: src/apm_cli/commands/pack.py warns 'apm unpack is deprecated and will be removed in v0.14'. Current version is v0.15.0 -- the v0.14 target has already passed.
expected_behavior: Orchestrator applies surgical edit: 'removed in v0.14' -> 'removed in a future release'.
Re-run stale-deprecation scan: no v0.14-target matches remain.
CHANGELOG [Unreleased] gets a Fixed entry noting the timeline refresh.
scenarios.control_baseline: Without the skill, this drift survives indefinitely -- per-PR review doesn't fire because no PR touches the line.
